about.bio: Full-Stack Developer with 1+ year of professional experience in .NET, C#, ASP.NET Core, and React.js, specializing in building scalable, secure, and high-performance web applications. Strong foundation in Computer Science & Engineering with hands-on experience in enterprise-level development, REST API design, and modern frontend frameworks.Proficient in end-to-end development, from backend business logic to responsive UI design. Experienced in Agile environments, clean architecture, and performance optimization. Actively seeking Software Development Engineer (SDE) / Full-Stack / Web Developer roles.
about.funFact: Refactored a legacy .NET codebase that cut API response time by 60% — with all tests still green!

projects.title: Enterprise Task Management System
projects.description: Full-featured project management platform for enterprise teams. Role-based access, real-time notifications via SignalR, Kanban boards, and reporting dashboards.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform API
projects.description: Robust RESTful API backend supporting multi-vendor architecture with JWT auth, Stripe payment integration, inventory management, and order tracking.

projects.title: Healthcare Appointment Portal
projects.description: Secure portal for scheduling healthcare appointments. Patients book, reschedule, cancel. Doctors view schedules and patient history with encrypted data handling.

projects.title: CLI Portfolio Generator
projects.description: Node.js command-line tool that scaffolds a developer portfolio from a config JSON, generating a static HTML site with one command.

projects.title: Real-time Weather Dashboard
projects.description: Responsive dashboard fetching live data from OpenWeatherMap API with forecasts, humidity, wind speed, and UV index chart visualizations.

projects.title: Markdown Blog Engine
projects.description: Lightweight static blog that parses Markdown files with search, categories, and RSS feed. Renders as a fully navigable blog site.

experience.title: System Engineer
experience.location: New Town, kolkata, West Bengal, India
experience.description:
• Engineered and optimized scalable backend services using C#, .NET, and ASP.NET Core, significantly reducing application response time and improving system throughput under load
• Designed and deployed RESTful APIs with efficient routing, validation, and error handling, enhancing API performance and enabling seamless integration across multiple services
• Implemented complex business logic and optimized database interactions (SQL), reducing data processing time and improving query efficiency
• Developed and maintained batch processing systems (time-based and file-based) for automated data workflows, ensuring reliable execution, efficient large-scale data handling, and fault-tolerant processing
• Diagnosed and resolved critical production issues, leveraging advanced debugging and logging strategies to minimize system downtime and production incidents
• Refactored legacy codebase using SOLID principles and clean architecture patterns, improving code maintainability, scalability, and overall system design
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams in Agile environments, translating business requirements into technical solutions and accelerating feature delivery timelines
